mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in unemployment rate and increase in payrolls signals strong labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings visibility, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls > 0.5pp and PAYEMS rises > 50k in 3 months
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in 70%+ of instances where both UNRATE and PAYEMS meet the trigger conditions.

mechanism_narrative: Rising residential sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) indicate strong consumer demand for durable goods, driving equity market optimism and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both rise > 2% in 1 month
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where both RSAFS and HOUST meet the trigger conditions.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production (INDPRO) reflects robust manufacturing activity that correlates with higher corporate profits, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of periods where INDPRO shows a sustained upward trend.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2% (CPIAUCSL) triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as valuation multiples contract.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly contraction in GDP (GDPC1) signals weakening economic demand that reduces corporate revenue expectations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in 50%+ of periods where GDPC1 shows a quarterly decline.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in unemployment (UNRATE) above 7% indicates deteriorating labor market conditions that lower consumer spending confidence, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE meets the trigger condition.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in industrial production (INDPRO) reflects weakening manufacturing activity that correlates with lower corporate profits, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in 50%+ of periods where INDPRO shows a sustained downward trend.
